_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: brown r1, blue r2, green r3, red r4, Cinderwyrm (enrage apex boss) r5+, the 'Spoils of the Realms' affix batch (js/stats.js), PLUS the depth-themed BIOME system (js/realm.js): per-realm room architecture (halls/frost/blight/ember) mirroring the family ladder. 28.4% (1706/6000) on the post-biome --check, inside the [25,75] band; deeps average ~realm 6.4 (deepest 10), deaths ~boss>room, never 0/100%. The biome module is BALANCE-NEUTRAL BY CONSTRUCTION, not by tuning: selfplay's playthrough() abstracts the spatial dungeon layer and NEVER calls realm.js makeRoom, so re-shaping room walls cannot move the win rate — 28.4% vs the prior 28.2%/9000 is pure sampling noise. The biome layer instead has its OWN gate: scripts/selfplay.mjs now flood-fills every generated room (--rooms, folded into --check) and asserts single-component traversability + only known tile symbols; the 6000-run --check verified 26,400 rooms across all biomes with zero disconnections/stray symbols. KEY GOTCHA carried forward from affix work: gScore (combat.js) sums all stats equally, so armor/defense-heavy loot auto-equips over equal-scored offense and DILUTES boss-attrition wins — keep new loot offense/HP-first. NEW room-work gotcha: a biome that adds >1 wall per pillar or lets a pass-2 pillar sprout 'west' can wall off a region; keep the <=1-offshoot + no-west invariant or --rooms will fail. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
